generalProcedure.method: read the three national contour maps or contracting-entity-approved special values/maps and linearly interpolate between contours or local extrema

reason: The official CCP-14 ZIP contains maps but no finite locality registry or exact locality-to-PGA/Ss/S1 table. Commentary C3.10.2.1 says values would be available on a CD and web tools, but those authoritative data were not found in the current official publication or official searches. A reference-site count, map digitization, coordinates, GIS inference, or a secondary table cannot be substituted for the missing official selectable dataset.
requiredResolution: Obtain and hash-lock the official CCP-14 CD/web dataset, or obtain an authoritative INVÍAS/MinTransporte clarification defining the finite location set and exact values.
